name: Pick and Place
description: Robot picks an object from a source location and places it at a target location (bin).

phases.name: Above Pick
phases.description: EEF moves to a waypoint directly above the object.

phases.name: Descend
phases.description: EEF lowers toward the object.

phases.name: Settle
phases.description: Brief hold to let physics settle before grasping.

phases.name: Close
phases.description: Gripper closes around the object.

phases.name: Lift
phases.description: EEF lifts the grasped object off the surface.

phases.name: Move XY
phases.description: Lateral transfer toward the bin.

phases.name: Lower
phases.description: EEF lowers into the bin.

phases.name: Open
phases.description: Gripper opens, object released.

phases.name: Retract
phases.description: EEF moves away from the bin.

phases.name: Return
phases.description: EEF returns to home configuration.

name: Screwing
description: Robot tightens a pre-gripped screw into a threaded hole, then loosens and retrieves it.

phases.name: Approach
phases.description: EEF moves to a pre-contact waypoint above the fastener.

phases.name: Descend
phases.description: EEF lowers to engage the fastener.

phases.name: Screw
phases.description: Continuous downward force + wrist rotation to thread.

phases.name: Disengage
phases.description: Gripper opens / tool lifts off.

phases.name: Retract
phases.description: EEF returns to a safe height.

phases.name: Descend
phases.description: EEF lowers to engage the fastener.

phases.name: Loosen
phases.description: Loosen screw.

phases.name: Engage
phases.description: Gripper closes.

phases.name: Retract
phases.description: EEF returns to a home position.

name: Peg in Hole
description: Robot inserts a pre-gripped peg into a fixture/slot, releases it, then retrieves it and returns home.

phases.name: Above Hole
phases.description: EEF moves above the hole and aligns.

phases.name: Insert
phases.description: EEF pushes peg downward into the hole.

phases.name: Disengage
phases.description: Gripper opens.

phases.name: Above Hole
phases.description: EEF rises back to the waypoint above the hole.

phases.name: Retract
phases.description: EEF returns to home position.

phases.name: Above Object
phases.description: EEF moves above the object and aligns with object.

phases.name: Engage
phases.description: Gripper closes.

phases.name: Above Object
phases.description: EEF rises back to the waypoint above the object.

phases.name: Retract
phases.description: EEF returns to home position.
